title: Add token-budget-aware partial compaction (parity with CC microCompact.ts)
description:
## Goal
Implement microcompact behavior from CC services/compact/microCompact.ts (~530 lines): partial tool-result clearing that avoids a full conversation summarization.

## CC behaviors (microCompact.ts lines 41–529)
- COMPACTABLE_TOOLS set: FileRead, Bash/Shell tools, Grep, Glob, WebSearch, WebFetch, FileEdit, FileWrite
- estimateMessageTokens(): pads roughTokenCount by 4/3 factor for conservatism; handles text, tool_result, tool_use, thinking, redacted_thinking, image/document blocks
- TIME_BASED_MC_CLEARED_MESSAGE sentinel = '[Old tool result content cleared]'
- microcompactMessages(): checks time-based trigger first (cold-cache path), then cached-MC path (ant-only, CACHED_MICROCOMPACT feature), no-ops for external builds
- evaluateTimeBasedTrigger(): fires when gap since last assistant > threshold minutes AND main-thread querySource
- maybeTimeBasedMicrocompact(): content-clears old tool results in-place, keeps last N compactable IDs, logs tengu_time_based_microcompact event, resets microcompact state
- cachedMicrocompactPath(): registers tool results, queues cache_edits API block instead of mutating content, tracks pinnedEdits for re-sending on subsequent calls
- consumePendingCacheEdits() / getPinnedCacheEdits() / pinCacheEdits(): API-layer integration
- resetMicrocompactState(): clears all cached-MC module state + pendingCacheEdits
- MicrocompactResult type: messages + optional compactionInfo.pendingCacheEdits
- IMAGE_MAX_TOKEN_SIZE = 2000 tokens for image/document blocks

## OC counterpart
None. OC has no partial tool-result compaction. context window pressure goes directly to full compaction.

## apiMicrocompact.ts (~153 lines) gap
CC also has server-side context management via getAPIContextManagement(): ContextManagementConfig with clear_tool_uses_20250919 and clear_thinking_20251015 strategies sent as API parameters. OC does not send context_management in requests.

## Parent
#523. Phase 1 spec tracked in #534.
